title: Support elaboration `$info(%p)` and avoid Unexpected Call

features.name: $info system task with %p format in generate block
features.description: Code should include a $info system task call inside a generate block using %p format specifier to print a multi-dimensional unpacked array parameter

features.name: 2D unpacked array parameter with %p in $info
features.description: Code should include a two-dimensional unpacked array parameter used with %p format specifier in an $info elaboration system task
